utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: How could you pick up a hitchhiker ? ! He could be a rape ... , a rapist or a killer or something !

emotion_cause.span: 1_How could you pick up a hitchhiker ? ! He could be a rape ... , a rapist or a killer or something !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Do not you think I asked him that before he got in ? !

emotion_cause.span: 2_Do not you think I asked him that before he got in ? !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You know what ? I am not talking to you ! You go back to sleep ! And you , are you a rapist ? !

emotion_cause.span: 1_How could you pick up a hitchhiker ? ! He could be a rape ... , a rapist or a killer or something !

utterances.speaker: Hitchhiker
utterances.text: Yeah , you know the license plate game ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I love the license plate game !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ooh , I will play ! I will play !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No ... No ! You need your sleep . Night ... night ! Shh !
